zh.lifeSummary: 當Richilde de Metz於0960年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒倫艾維爾時，她的父親Folmar Ier de Metz25歲，母親Berta d'Ivrea22歲。她於0985年與Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於0995年享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richilde de Metz于0960年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆特-吉莫瑟勒倫艾維爾时，她的父亲Folmar Ier de Metz25岁，母亲Berta d'Ivrea22岁。她于0985年与Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于0995年享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Metz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the female personal name Mechthild, composed of ancient Germanic maht ‘might, strength’ + hild ‘strife, battle’.

German, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Metz in Lorraine, which took its name from a Gaulish tribe, the Mediomatrici; in the name of the place this became abbreviated to Mettis, hence the modern name.
German: from Mätz, a short form of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Mette
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the female personal name Mechthild (see Metz ).
North German: occupational name for a miller, from Middle Low German matte, mette ‘dry measure’.
French: topographic name from Old French mete ‘boundary stone, boundary’ (from Latin meta ‘bounded estate’).

variants.name: Metzer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Metz (see   Metz  ).
Dutch: occupational name for a bricklayer, Middle Dutch metsere.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Metze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Gerhard, Gernot.
metronymic from a short form of the personal name Mechthild (see Metz 1).

en.lifeSummary: When Richilde de Metz was born in 0960, in Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Folmar Ier de Metz, was 25 and her mother, Berta d'Ivrea, was 22. She married Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine in 0985. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 0995, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richilde de Metz est née en 0960, à Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Folmar Ier de Metz, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Berta d'Ivrea, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine en 0985. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 0995, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richilde de Metz 0960 in Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Folmar Ier de Metz 25 und ihre Mutter Berta d'Ivrea 22. Sie hat 0985 Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 0995 im Alter von 35 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Metz è nata il nel 0960 nel Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Folmar Ier de Metz, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Berta d'Ivrea, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine nel 0985. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 0995, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richilde de Metzが0960年にフランスグランド エストメウルスエ-エト-モセルルンeヴィルで生まれた時，父Folmar Ier de Metzは25歳，母Berta d'Ivreaは22歳であった。0985年にTheodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は0995年に35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richilde de Metz(이)가 0960년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우르테-트-모셀 루e빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Folmar Ier de Metz(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berta d'Ivrea(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 0985년 Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 0995년 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Metz nasceu em 0960, em Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Folmar Ier de Metz, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Berta d'Ivrea, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine em 0985. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 0995, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richilde de Metz родилась в 0960 г. в местности лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Folmar Ier de Metz было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Berta d'Ivrea, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine в 0985 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 0995 г. в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richilde de Metz nació en 0960, en Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Folmar Ier de Metz, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Berta d'Ivrea, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Theodoric I Duke of Upper Lorraine en 0985. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 0995, a la edad de 35 años.
